narrative:
Ismael Saibari is an attacking midfielder for Morocco at the FIFA World Cup 2026. His overall rating is an impressive 7.32/10, which places him in the top 2% of attacking midfields at this tournament. This high rating is derived significantly from his club form over the last two seasons, comprising 59% of his score.

Saibari shows exceptional finishing ability, with 1.111 goals per 90 minutes at this World Cup from 2.222 shots per 90. His expected goals per 90 minutes is 0.646, highlighting his clinical nature in front of goal. However, his expected assists per 90 minutes stands at 0.09, suggesting he is more of a direct goal threat than a primary creator.

Having played 243 minutes, Saibari is clearly a crucial goal-scoring asset for Morocco from his attacking midfield position. Scouts should continue to monitor his strong goal-scoring instincts and ability to get shots off. Fans should also watch for any increase in his key passes per 90 minutes, currently 0.741, in their remaining matches.
